app_release_notes: v1.2.5 - Import fixes: your target groups now line up with the right charge automatically by shot/measure order (real BallisticX date/time files score correctly, not velocity-only). Your ladder also matches even when you shoot fewer shots per charge than planned. Plus Garmin Xero multi-session .xlsx import, a standalone seating-depth test can be saved to your Library, and 'Start a new ladder' / 'Reset queue' truly clear staged files.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.5 - Import fixes: your target groups now line up with the right charge automatically by shot/measure order (real BallisticX date/time files score correctly, not velocity-only). Your ladder also matches even when you shoot fewer shots per charge than planned. Plus Garmin Xero multi-session .xlsx import, a standalone seating-depth test can be saved to your Library, and 'Start a new ladder' / 'Reset queue' truly clear staged files.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.3 - Your Load Library now shows ALL your loads in one place: your active load plus every past (archived) one, clearly marked, so nothing feels hidden. The table fits the window with your performance numbers always visible, Print actually prints the page, and you can now name a load on the Loadscope Ballistics phone app and that name shows up here.
